lore:quest.name: Nightlantern's Errand
lore:quest.description: Sella Nightlantern's lantern burns memory, and it is running low. Bring her 6 glass bottles and 4 glowstone dust to decant fresh light — and she will part with a relic she won regrettably.
steps: Accept the quest from Sella Nightlantern when her lantern visits Elderfall.
Return to Sella and turn them in through her dialogue.
